tasks.title: Project Brain Graduation: Folder Reorganization
tasks.instruction: Rename the folder `CONTEXT FILES.AGENTS` to `.agents/context/`. This creates a professional, tool-friendly directory structure for our system specifications. Ensure all 6 internal files are moved without loss.

tasks.title: Graduate Image Engine Spec to LIVE Status
tasks.instruction: The Image Engine is now officially LIVE. Update this document to reflect the absolute current reality: 1. Document the 200/400/800/1200 SnapBucket width array. 2. Document the dynamic multi-tenant prefixing (mapping `/images/` to `PUBLIC_BRAND_ID/` in R2). 3. Document the automated Dev-Mode fallback to local disk. Remove all 'Proposed' or 'Discovery' language.

tasks.title: Formalize Multi-Brand Architecture Rules
tasks.instruction: Update this document to include the `PUBLIC_BRAND_ID` rule. Explain that the project source code remains brand-neutral, while the brand name in the environment variable acts as the 'Master Key' to the correct R2 media folder and content directory.

tasks.title: Create Documentation Library Index
tasks.instruction: Create a professional index file for the new `.agents/context/` directory. Explain the purpose of each of the 6 spec files and why this folder is the 'Source of Truth' for all future AI agents and human developers.
